description: A reader should fail sync when the seed opens the wire session from an unregistered sender identity.

assertions.description: Reader rejects the opening HELLO because the wire sender is not registered.
Reader does not write a manifest or verified object set after the unknown-sender violation.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with direct sender-validation coverage for unknown sender rejection.
The harness rewrites the generated HELLO to use an impostor sender identity before replay.
